The Tap Room

Cold craft beer, warm atmosphere, live entertainment — and friendly faces all week long.

When We're Open
Hours of Operation

TuesdayClosed
Wednesday4pm – 9pm
Thursday3pm – 9pm
Friday3pm – 9pm

MondayClosed

Weekly Entertainment
Always Something Going On
🧠
Every Wednesday

Trivia Night

Put your knowledge to the test. 6pm – 8pm. Tap room opens at 4pm.

🎸
Every Thursday

Live Music

Local and regional artists on stage. 5:30pm – 8:30pm. Tap room opens at 3pm.

🎶
Every Sunday

Live Music

Wind down the weekend with live music. 2pm – 5pm. Tap room opens at 1pm.

What to Expect
The Experience
01

Craft Beer on Tap

A rotating selection of small-batch brews, each named after one of Westmoreland's 7 original hamlets. From light and sessionable to bold and complex.

02

Food on Site

Our kitchen is open Wed–Sun with fresh, hearty options. The "Come and Get It" food truck also stops by regularly.

03

A True Community Spot

Family-friendly, welcoming, and rooted in Westmoreland. More than a brewery — a gathering place for neighbors and friends.

Follow for Updates

Special events, featured taps, and last-minute announcements posted on social.

Visit Our Facebook →
